tests.summary: Wrapper compiles cleanly with module cflags
pt2_audio load missing returns -1 (negative); satisfies verification contract

codegraph.init: codegraph sync — Indexed 452 files, 10,456 nodes, 35,735 edges in 3.4s
codegraph.affected: codegraph affected modules/pt2_audio/pt2_audio_wrapper.c modules/pt2_audio/module.json — No test files affected by the changed files
codegraph.impact: codegraph impact modules/pt2_audio/pt2_audio_wrapper.c — 1 affected symbol: pt2_audio_wrapper.c (file), no production code impact beyond the wrapper itself
codegraph.assessment: Changes are self-contained within the pt2_audio module. No test files directly reference wrapper.c; mvp.nano exercises the existing init/stop path which still works.

modules/pt2_audio/pt2_audio_wrapper.c.description: 1) Added #include for pt2_module_loader.h. 2) Added static pt2_mod_t g_mod variable to hold loaded module. 3) pt2_audio_load_mod now calls pt2_mod_load_file() after fopen check; returns -1 on invalid format. 4) pt2_audio_play adds #ifdef PT2_FULL_BUILD guard calling modPlay(-1,0,0). 5) pt2_audio_stop adds modStop() call inside PT2_FULL_BUILD guard alongside existing clearBlepState().

modules/pt2_audio/module.json.description: Added ../pt2_module/pt2_module_loader.c to c_sources and added -Imodules/pt2_module to cflags.

assumptions: modPlay signature in pt2_replayer.h is modPlay(int16_t patt, int16_t pos, int8_t row); called with (-1, 0, 0) to play from beginning (pattern -1 means current/default).
The PT2_FULL_BUILD guard ensures the wrapper compiles in portable stub mode without requiring SDL or replayer symbols.
The mvp.nano assert (>= code -1) still holds because pt2_audio_init returns 0 which satisfies >= -1.
